title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, making it trivial to integrate local LLMs into any Python script.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama, works in Node.js and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, allowing local models to be used as LLM, chat, or embedding providers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (renamed to Open WebUI), supports RAG, multimodal, admin panel, and more.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with builder-style APIs, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Async Rust client for Ollama with Tokio, strongly-typed requests/responses.

title: Ollama-GUI
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app that wraps Ollama’s REST API for macOS/Linux/Windows.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local LLM code completion via Ollama, similar to GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-maintained interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, featuring syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal pod autoscaling.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that sends code or prompts to Ollama and streams responses directly into buffers.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Next.js chat app using Ollama and Vercel AI SDK, supports RAG via Supabase/pgvector.

title: ollama-workflows
summary: Collection of n8n and Temporal workflows that orchestrate Ollama models for summarization, translation, etc.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that uses Ollama for local AI-assisted note taking, summarization, and semantic search.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready docker-compose stack bundling Ollama, Open WebUI, GPU support, and Nginx reverse proxy.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama with ActiveModel-style interfaces and Rails integration examples.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama supporting .NET 6+, Blazor, and MAUI samples.

title: ollama-dify
summary: Step-by-step guide to plug Ollama models into Dify for building local LLM apps with low-code.

title: ollama-reddit-discussion
summary: Reddit thread discussing the new tool-calling beta in Ollama v0.1.11 with community examples.
